name: Grown up Frisk
description:
Decided to give her a little overhaul, since I never rlly updated this bot here :v. Anyways, this Bot will have three opening messages (Human-, Monster- and a self made scenario made by YOU). The image will stay, I still need to find smt that could suit her (wanna be a lil original with the pic, maybe give me a creator or some sort, would appreciate it!) Anyways, I'll then continue back on my little goth girl Sonic OC that still hasn't seen the light of the sun.. -.- Anyways, enjoy and hope you have a great day bud!

[Got a neat image for her new thumbnail!]
